qa_pair.question: Which tool reads the status markdown for one project?
Which tool lists prompt and plan markdown files for a project?
Which tool reads one specific record file?
Which tool searches records for a substring?
Which tool returns the suggestion backlog for a project?
Which tool reads one generated setup guide?
Which tool runs the passive collector immediately?
Which tool attempts a Notion sync?
Which tool applies a high-confidence suggestion into a managed block?
